meta.val_split: seed-1337 WSI-grouped GroupShuffleSplit (baseline.yaml val_fraction); identical for every member so OOF rows align
meta.notes: Colab poll-loop consumes the first status=pending job by priority; writes oof_<member>.csv + sub_<member>.csv + job_<id>.json(status=done) back to jackiemartindale/histopath-colab-out.

jobs.notes: BOOTSTRAP: inference-only. Dump OOF (id,label,pred=TTA) for the 4 existing champions on the fixed val split; copy their existing test submissions as sub_<member>.csv. p4m nets are D4-invariant so pred=no-TTA. If a Drive checkpoint is missing, retrain from repo (cheap on A100). This establishes the offline-proxy baseline that must reproduce the known ~0.9523 champion.
Highest-EV rescue: re-checkpoint the TinyVGG mirage on val_LOSS (not val_auc). Emit OOF + TTA test submission. One variable vs the human TinyVGG member = the checkpoint monitor.
Re-confirm/strengthen p4m_reg with val_loss checkpointing (AdamW wd=1e-4, hard 6ep cap). D4-invariant -> no TTA.
Period-honest (2019) PyTorch equivariant member (QUVA-Lab e2cnn/escnn) — a genuinely new architecture family for decorrelation. Requires a PyTorch cell path in the Colab loop.
Macenko stain-normalized input -> decorrelated preprocessing member. Stain-norm at inference too.
Cheap decorrelated member: fit logistic/linear-SVM on p4m penultimate features. Inference-only-ish; fast.
p4m seed deep-ensemble diversity (different seed only).
